summary:
Website sessions grew 8% month-over-month to 106, driven by organic search traffic growing 40% (10 → 14 sessions). We published two Costa Rica blog posts this month — a travel guide and a corporate incentive trip case study — which are starting to pull in search traffic. LinkedIn posting is on pause until we have trip photos ready to pair with posts, so impressions are down this month — but that just means there's a lot of great content queued up for April.

 QR codes were a big win this month after the Cancun trip more than doubling reviews from ~40 to 92. Next month we're focused on getting Cancun and Costa Rica content live and exploring a LinkedIn ads pilot for the corporate side.

metrics.label: Website Sessions
metrics.note: Up 8% from 96 in February. Organic search up 40%.

metrics.label: LinkedIn Followers
metrics.note: +8 from last month. Steady organic growth without active posting.

metrics.label: LinkedIn Impressions
metrics.note: Posts paused this month — trip content queued up for April.

metrics.label: Engagement Rate
metrics.note: Still well above the LinkedIn average of 2-3%.

findings.title: Organic Search Traffic Is Growing
findings.description: Google organic sessions went from 10 in February to 14 in March — a 40% increase. Still small numbers, but the two Costa Rica blog posts are starting to index and pull in search traffic. This is the compounding effect of consistent content.

findings.title: QR Codes Work for Client Action
findings.description: The QR codes seemed to work great, and you did great with getting people to follow through. That social proof is a great asset for future pitches and website credibility.

actions.title: Costa Rica Travel Guide Blog Post
actions.description: Published a full Costa Rica destination travel guide on the website.

actions.title: Costa Rica Corporate Case Study
actions.description: Published "50 People, 3 Days, Zero Burnout" — corporate incentive trip case study showcasing group travel planning.

actions.title: Content Strategy for April
actions.description: Mapped out next month's content plan including Cancun case study, LinkedIn posts, and Costa Rica page updates.

actions.title: Costa Rica Page Photo Swap
actions.description: Ready to update the page hero image once we have the Costa Rica and Cancun photos from the trips.

actions.title: LinkedIn Content — Cancun & Costa Rica
actions.description: Posts drafted and ready to go — just need to pair them with trip photos for maximum impact.

nextSteps: Swap in trip photos on the website once we have them — the pages are prepped and ready.
Publish Cancun spring break case study — 347 students, 6 groups, zero-fee model. Great content for LinkedIn and the website.
Resume LinkedIn posting cadence with trip content, aiming for 2-4 posts in April.
Pull best testimonial quotes from TLN reviews for social proof content.
